name: Hatch Your Egg 🎇
description:
Suddenly a mysterious egg pops in front of your door.

Will you take care of it well?

I set is as limitless because the possibilities are endless lol. You could try finding eggs's father and try romancing him or you could find love while living with your egg or you can even go wild and slay demons after growing up your egg.
creator: RoseWithThorns
